name: BhashaBench-Finance (English)
description: A comprehensive finance and quantitative aptitude benchmark in English, covering 20+ topics including banking services, data analytics, mathematical reasoning, and problem solving. Part of the BhashaBench series designed to evaluate AI models on Indian financial knowledge.
methodology: Difficulty estimation using 3 generator models (Llama-3.1-8B, Llama-4-Scout-17B, Llama-3.3-70B) via Groq API. Each model independently answers the MCQ and its predicted letter (A/B/C/D) is compared against the ground truth answer using exact match. Correct → 1, Wrong → 0. Pattern: 111 → Easy, two 1s → Medium, 0 or 1 correct → Hard.
